basic_details.organization_name: Hindustan Aeronautics Limited (HAL), Aircraft Division, Nasik (A Maharatna CPSE)
basic_details.application_mode: By Post / Courier / By Hand only (No email applications accepted)
basic_details.short_information: The Hindustan Aeronautics (HAL) Recruitment 2026 for posts of 02 Physiotherapist. Candidates with Any Bachelors Degree, Any Masters Degree Can Apply Offline. The Offline application opens on 01-06-2026, and closes on 08-06-2026. The candidate shall apply Offline through HAL website, https://hal-india.co.in.

age_limit.age_details: 40 years as on 01-06-2026 (date of advertisement); No further relaxation is admissible

selection_process: Shortlisting + Personal Interview at HAL Hospital, Ojhar Township
how_to_apply: Candidates must apply offline only using the prescribed application format (Annexure-I). No application/resume will be accepted by email.
